{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lord
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] aims to break into the [[Lord realm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
